The New AcademyThe New AcademyWhat would a (cognitive) city look like if it were designed by all its citizens? The New Academy, an initiative of the Nieuwe Instituut in collaboration with philosopher Rosi Braidotti, reimagines Rotterdam as a knowledge city.

Photo: Cristiano Corte6 May 2025The Dutch Pavilion presents SIDELINED: A Space to Rethink Togetherness at La Biennale Architettura 2025The Dutch Pavilion presents SIDELINED: A Space to Rethink Togetherness at La Biennale Architettura 2025The pavilion, commissioned by the Nieuwe Instituut, transforms the Dutch Pavilion into an alternative sports bar — a playful yet critical space that questions the rules and rituals of social interaction.
